settings.heading: Play Any Course.
settings.subtext: 5 Golfzon indoor simulator bays — play world-famous courses, track your stats, and improve your game year-round. Rain or shine.

settings.name: Golfzon Vision Technology
settings.description: Ultra-realistic ball tracking and course simulation with slope detection, wind, and pin placement accuracy.

settings.name: 200+ World Courses
settings.description: Play Augusta, Pebble Beach, St Andrews, and over 200 other world-famous courses without leaving Atlanta.

settings.name: Swing Analysis
settings.description: Every shot tracked with launch angle, ball speed, spin rate, and club path data. Improve faster with data-backed feedback.

settings.name: Open Rain or Shine
settings.description: Unlike the range, simulators run no matter the weather. Perfect for winter practice or late-night sessions.

settings.name: 30 Minutes
settings.description: A quick warm-up or skills session. Great for squeezing in practice before a round.

settings.name: 1 Hour
settings.description: Our most popular option. Enough time to play 9 holes or run a full practice session with swing analysis.

settings.name: 2 Hours
settings.description: Play a full 18 holes or run a deep practice block. Best value for groups or serious training sessions.

settings.features_subtext: 5 Golfzon indoor simulator bays — play world-famous courses, track your stats, and improve your game year-round. Rain or shine.
settings.pricing_subtext: Reserve a bay by the hour. Walk-ins welcome based on availability — call ahead to guarantee your slot.
settings.disclaimer: Rates are per bay. Up to 4 players per bay. Prices subject to change.
settings.cta_subtext: Call us or stop by to reserve a simulator bay. Walk-ins welcome based on availability.
